name: County National Bank
description_short: County National Bank is a community bank serving South-Central Michigan, offering personal and business banking, mortgages, wealth management, and digital services.
description_long: County National Bank (CNB) is a regional bank headquartered in South-Central Michigan with a focus on community banking relationships. The bank operates under CNB Community Bancorp, Inc. and emphasizes local decision-making, local underwriters, and closers for mortgage lending. Their website indicates an established presence with multiple service lines spanning personal, business, and wealth management sectors. The bank offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including personal checking and savings accounts, business banking services, mortgages, CDs, IRAs, credit cards, ATM and debit card services, health savings accounts, and Telebanc phone banking. Their business division provides additional services like IntraFi® Network Deposits, business credit cards, and treasury management. Wealth management services include investment management, trust and estate settlement, retirement planning, and insurance services through a dedicated wealth management team. County National Bank distinguishes itself through local control and decision-making, particularly in mortgage lending where they highlight having local underwriters and closers. They offer digital-first services including online and mobile banking, online bill pay, and e-statements. The bank emphasizes accessibility, with AudioEye-enabled website optimization, and provides financial education resources including calculators, FAQs, and a financial education center. As a traditional community bank, CNB serves customers seeking personalized banking relationships over larger national institutions. Prospective customers should contact the bank directly or visit locations to understand pricing and terms compared to alternatives.
services: Certificates of Deposit (CDs) and Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs)
pros: Local decision-making structure with local underwriters and closers for mortgages
Comprehensive digital services including mobile app, online banking, and bill pay
Dedicated wealth management team offering investment management and retirement planning
IntraFi® Network Deposits for business customers providing additional FDIC coverage options
Accessible website with AudioEye toolbar for users with accessibility needs
Multiple service lines from personal checking to business treasury management
Financial education resources including calculators and educational center
cons: No interest rate, APY, or fee information disclosed on website for comparison shopping
Limited geographic presence restricted to South-Central Michigan service area
No information about minimum deposit requirements or account opening standards
Security transition to one-time passcodes may create temporary usability friction for existing users
Wealth management and private banking services likely require higher minimum balances not disclosed
best_for: South-Central Michigan residents seeking personalized community banking relationships
Business owners requiring treasury management and working capital solutions
High-net-worth individuals interested in wealth management and estate planning services
Mortgage borrowers who value local underwriting and decision-making processes
diagnosis: County National Bank is best for South-Central Michigan residents and business owners seeking community-oriented banking with local decision-making, particularly for mortgage and wealth management services. The main caveat is that specific pricing, rates, fees, and minimum requirements are not disclosed online, requiring direct contact with the bank for informed product comparison and decision-making.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: County National Bank serves South-Central Michigan with personal and business banking, mortgages, and wealth management.
